findings.message: The compose overlay interpolates ${APP_WIDGET_API_URL} (added to the app service's environment) but no APP_WIDGET_API_URL is declared in .env.example. With no declaration and no shell-exported value, Compose substitutes an empty string, so the app silently receives a blank widget API URL across dev/test (and any environment that composed base.yml). Every ${APP_*} interpolation must have a corresponding .env.example entry.
findings.suggestion: Add APP_WIDGET_API_URL to the FRAMEWORK-managed block of .env.example (with a sensible default/placeholder and a comment), matching the name exactly. If the app is meant to consume it, also add the corresponding APP_-prefixed pydantic field in src/demo/config/settings.py.
